string.text:
Weapon tooltips now show a DAMAGE panel below the description, the columns are:

- Type: Shows an ammo type available to this weapon.
- AP: Shows the AP value of the ammo.
- vs Torso (BRC): Show how much damage this weapon + ammo will do to an NPC with an armor value equivalent to the shown BRC value.
- vs Head (BRC): Same but vs the head.

Damage numbers are colored grey to green according to how well they penetrate that BRC value.

The optional weapon damage stat row (Main settings) can show:

- Hit Power: weapon hit_power as % per pellet, no ammo modifier (pellet count is only applied in the damage table)
- Damage Per Ammo: max damage (no armor) per ammo type using the same calc as the table, in the table's ammo order, e.g. 45/38/22/18

Degraded ammo is ignored for the damage stat rows.

Under the hood, every damage value uses hidden NPC bone-armor values (spine for torso, head bone for headshots), not the BRC values you see on armor. The BRC values are used to make things easier to understand. You can swap to NPC armor % values if you prefer.

What each vs Torso BRC column roughly matches in GAMMA:
- 10 - Novice: leather jacket, no armor (stalker_novice)
- 20 - Trainee: light loner jacket (stalker_trainee)
- 30 - Professional: LCS vest / PS5-M (stalker_professional)
- 40 - Veteran: PS5 suit / soldier vest (stalker_veteran)
- 50 - Master: SKAT-9 / Berill heavy armor (stalker_master)
- 60 - Legend: exoskeleton (stalker_legend)

What each vs Head BRC column roughly matches:
- 10 - Respirator / gas mask (actor_helm_respirator)
- 20 - Screen helmet (actor_helm_screen)
- 30 - Hard hat / ZSH (actor_helm_hardhat)
- 35 - Battle helmet (actor_helm_battle)
- 45 - Exo / Spartan helm (actor_helm_spartan)

How each damage cell is calculated (at 20 meters, current difficulty):

1. dist = 1 + 20/200 x (k_air x 0.5 / (1 - k_air + 0.1))
2. AP = k_ap x 10 (+ 0.04 on headshots) x tier_ap_scale / dist x difficulty x 0.80
3. power = hit_power / dist x k_hit x bone_mult x tier_ap_scale x 1.1 x difficulty x pellets
 (bone_mult = 0.9 torso, 3.65 head; pellets = buck_shot for shotguns, else 1)
4. If AP >= tier armor: damage = power x 100
 Else: damage = power x tier_chip x 100

Difficulty multipliers: Scout/Stalker 1.30, Veteran 1.05, Master 0.90.

NOT INCLUDED: artefacts, ballistic plates, silencers, barrel wear, range other than 20 m, or flat BR protection. For broader GAMMA weapon mechanics see stalker-gamma-db.com.
